children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The agency shall consult with the designated person who filed the written application pursuant to and provide him or her with periodic updates during the case file review and full reinvestigation.section 60901 of this title

children.heading: Explanation of conclusion
children.label: b Explanation of conclusion
children.text: The agency shall meet with the designated person and discuss the evidence to explain to the designated person who filed the written application pursuant to its decision whether or not to engage in the full reinvestigation provided for under at the conclusion of the case file review.section 60901 of this titlesection 60903 of this title
